channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The AI arms race in cybersecurity has begun. Most companies are not prepared
item.description: Coinbase's head of security provides advice for companies to defend against a new wave of AI-driven threats.

item.title: Russia warns war costs are straining its finances as Ukrainian drone superiority challenges Putin's forces in new combat phase
item.description: Economic growth is also stagnating, with GDP expected to rise only 0.4% this year, down from a previous forecast of 1.3%.

item.title: Exclusive: Microsoft is developing a super app that integrates coding, chat, and other Copilot AI tools
item.description: The initiative is led by new Copilot chief Jacob Andreou as Microsoft aims to streamline its AI tools amid competition from Google.

item.title: Trump suggested a 15% government stake in a major railroad merger
item.description: Trump did not name specific companies, but Union Pacific's pending acquisition of Norfolk Southern is the only known railroad deal currently in progress.
